Location.title: Location
Location.description: A construction site or project location representing a physical workspace.

name.description: The unique display name of the location.

StockEntry.title: Stock Entry
StockEntry.description: A record of material inventory currently available at a specific location.

unit.description: Unit of measurement (e.g., m3, zak, kg).

RAPItem.title: RAP Item
RAPItem.description: Rencana Anggaran Perusahaan (Enterprise Budget Plan) item defining planned material usage.

totalOrdered.description: Accumulated quantity ordered against this budget item.

MaterialRequest.title: Material Request
MaterialRequest.description: A formal request for materials from a site manager to the logistics team.

recipient.description: Person who received the material at site.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: System-generated notification for real-time alerts across roles.

MainMaterial.title: Main Material
MainMaterial.description: Master material names available for SM to request.

locations.description: Collection of all site project locations.

locations/{locationId}/stock.description: Nested material inventory records for a specific project.

locations/{locationId}/rapData.description: Budget plan items specific to a project's cost center.

requests.description: Central collection for all material logistics workflows.

notifications.description: Broadcast and targeted alerts for dashboard users.
